name: Enemy Defeat
description: a descending puff as an enemy is defeated and vanishes

ai.prompt: An enemy defeated and collapsing: a heavy impact followed by a body/armor collapse and a short low descending magical dissipation. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
